name: @consiliency/contract
description: Consiliency cross-repo contract package: the .consiliency layout, archetype registry, required-doc sets, interface-declaration schema, loop-gate protocol, canonical_html.v1, and the version-skew protocol. Vendored by agent-harness and governed-pipeline; owned by neither. v0.0.x is a provisioning placeholder — contract content lands in 0.1.0.
